## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Innerwell and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy, content development, and website improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SMS campaign with next-day availability messaging showed strong performance, prompting exploration of wider implementation](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [New category/landing page design proposed, with feedback to include more CTAs, authorship info, and table of contents](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [Blog template updates discussed, including addition of images, author details, and EEAT improvements](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [URL remapping and site architecture changes in progress, separating condition hub content from blog](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)

## Topics

### SMS Campaign Success

  - [Targeted campaign in 10 states with next-day availability](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [One of the best performing days of the year](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [Considering implementation across website, potentially as exit pop-up](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [Challenge: Making messaging dynamic based on daily availability](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)

### Category/Landing Page Design

  - [New design proposed for condition hub and subcategories](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [Includes navigation, key facts section, multiple images, and treatment tables](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Feedback: Add authorship, table of contents, CTAs, and cross-linking to other condition hubs](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)
  - [Next steps: Pass to creative team for branding and CTA integration](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)

### Blog Template Updates

  - [Feedback provided on new blog template](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Suggestions include adding author images, disclosures, and table of contents](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
  - [GrowthX can assist with image generation for articles](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [Pagination to be implemented to prevent orphaned content due to "load more" button](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)

### Site Architecture and URL Structure

  - [Discussion on separating condition hub content from blog](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [URL remapping in progress, with 301 redirects list to be provided by GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Condition hub pages to be treated as medical web pages, not blog articles](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)

### Content Production

  - [Editorial content on track for monthly goals](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
  - [PSEO pages slightly delayed due to automation build time](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
  - [FAQs and schema implementation likely to be part of V2](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1652.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Akina to write up design feedback for Thomas Law and post in Innerwell website channel](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)
  - [Anthony to submit ticket for Filip and Barislav to look into URL remapping](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide 301 redirects list for URL structure changes](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Innerwell to provide updated list of insurance per state](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
  - [Innerwell to review and respond to blog template feedback](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
  - [North Carolina location page to be pushed live](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1566.0)
  - [GrowthX to confirm timeline for PSEO pages and automation development](https://fathom.video/share/mVsRLVPN11PJs4Vq8Gx3LbppgCgGa_UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
